title: Duplicate: Stored XSS in Dictionary Notes and Metrics Fields
description:
**Duplicate of MBT-430.**

This ticket describes the same Stored XSS vulnerability in the Dictionary Notes and Metrics fields (CVSS 7.1). The fix was already implemented in MBT-430 using `strip_tags()` input sanitization.
acceptance_criteria: Fix applied in MBT-430 covers this vulnerability
implementation_notes: Duplicate of MBT-430. Developer confirmed the task was already created and fixed under MBT-430.
comment_summary: Developer noted this is a duplicate of MBT-430 which was created the previous day.
